description: Style Note Manually treated denim with a heavy washed look adds unique styling to this pair of jeans from spykar, while the blended fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. The stretchy quality of these jeans gives an excellent Fit as well. Team it with a T-shirt and sneakers. Product DetailsBlue washed jeans, has a mid waist, a buttoned and zippered closure, belt loops around the waist, brand patch at the back on the waistband, two insert pockets in front with a coin pocket inside the right pocket, two patch pockets at the back with stitched detail, a crumpled look around the waist and on the patch pockets and a slightly distressed look at the hemMaterial and Care98% cotton and 2% spandexWash and dry separatelyWash inside out using a mild detergentDo not bleach and dry in shade Use warm ironSize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
